mapper.select: select t.id, t.type, t.amount, t.currency, t.occurred_at as occurredAt, a.id as accountId, a.name as accountName, c.id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, c.icon as categoryIcon, c.color as categoryColor, t.note, t.source from transactions t join accounts a on a.id = t.account_id join categories c on c.id = t.category_id where t.user_id = #{userId} and t.id = #{id} and t.deleted_at is null

select t.id, t.type, t.amount, t.currency, t.occurred_at as occurredAt, a.id as accountId, a.name as accountName, c.id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, c.icon as categoryIcon, c.color as categoryColor, t.note, t.source from transactions t join accounts a on a.id = t.account_id join categories c on c.id = t.category_id where t.user_id = #{userId} and t.deleted_at is null and t.type = #{type} and t.currency = #{currency} and t.account_id = #{accountId} and t.category_id = #{categoryId} and t.occurred_at >= #{startAt} and t.occurred_at < #{endAt} order by t.occurred_at desc, t.created_at desc
